meaning: n.跳栏比赛选手,制造竹篱笆者
examples: For example, Liu was never satisfied with being the fastest 110-meter hurdler in the world.
In one television commercial, the hurdler chases a kangaroo across the Australian outback.
The 25-year-old hurdler is said to be recovering quickly and recently resumed his training in Shanghai.
Drut, a 110-meter hurdler, won silver in 1972 at Munich, then added gold at the 1976 Montreal Olympics.
On a sadder note for Pitman's team, it was announced his former star hurdler Monsignor has been retired.
